instruction: Recolor ONLY the icon between chart-bar and clock (the chart-pie) purple (#a855f7). Every other icon stays #222.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 272 80" width="272" height="80">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="272" height="80" fill="white" />
  <g id="chart-bar" data-source="heroicons/outline/chart-bar.svg" transform="translate(16, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 13.125C3 12.504 3.504 12 4.125 12h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v6.75C7.5 20.496 6.996 21 6.375 21h-2.25A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 3 19.875v-6.75ZM9.75 8.625c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v11.25c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V8.625ZM16.5 4.125c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25C20.496 3 21 3.504 21 4.125v15.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V4.125Z"/></g>
  <g id="chart-pie" data-source="heroicons/outline/chart-pie.svg" transform="translate(80, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10.5 6a7.5 7.5 0 1 0 7.5 7.5h-7.5V6Z"/>
  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M13.5 10.5H21A7.5 7.5 0 0 0 13.5 3v7.5Z"/></g>
  <g id="clock" data-source="heroicons/outline/clock.svg" transform="translate(144, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <g id="calendar" data-source="heroicons/outline/calendar.svg" transform="translate(208, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6.75 3v2.25M17.25 3v2.25M3 18.75V7.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 2.25-2.25h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 21 7.5v11.25m-18 0A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 5.25 21h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21 18.75m-18 0v-7.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 5.25 9h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 21 11.25v7.5"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 272 80" width="272" height="80">
